data.title: Epic: Claude's Home v2.0 — SkogAI Integration & Home Improvements
data.description:
After v1.0 (identity, routing, persistence, deployment gate, multi-agent readiness) completes, this epic covers making Claude's home genuinely useful as a workspace within the SkogAI ecosystem.

## Context

Claude explored the SkogAI ecosystem (332 repos under skogai org, Gas Town `~/gt/` shared workspace, sibling agents dot/amy/goose/aldervall/letta, Dolt database backend, skogfences philosophy). Key insight: Dot (gptme) built manually what Claude gets natively — a foundation for deeper integration.

## Sub-tasks

* Phase 5 Plan 1 — chat-io contract, routing script, bats tests
* Phase 5 Plan 2 — routing skill, hook fallback, settings wiring
* SkogAI ecosystem integration (gas town, sibling agent discovery)
* Document all binaries/scripts into [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)

## Repo

`SkogAI/claude`
